quality: Photorealistic, high resolution, professional real estate photography quality. Seamless blend at every horizon line, roofline, and architectural edge — no visible halos or hard cuts. Match shadow direction, length, and quality on all ground and surface elements to the new sky light source position. Do NOT move, add, remove, or alter any ground-level elements, buildings, vegetation, vehicles, furniture, pavement, or any surface. Do NOT change camera angle, perspective, or focal length. IMPORTANT: Do NOT paint or add a visible sun disc into the sky.

golden.label: Золотой час
golden.desc: warm golden hour sunset sky — rich gradient from deep amber-orange at the horizon blending upward through soft peach and rose-pink to pale lavender and powder blue overhead. No visible sun disc. Warm golden-orange directional light from low off-frame angle casting long soft shadows. Delicate pink-rose glow on cloud undersides. Warm amber tones washing gently over all surfaces and architecture.

midday.label: Полдень
midday.desc: bright clear midday — vibrant pure cerulean blue sky. No visible sun disc. Bright high overhead illumination, crisp short shadows falling directly below objects, vivid natural colors, strong clear visibility, no haze.

sunset_pink.label: Закат розовый
sunset_pink.desc: romantic pink sunset sky — vivid gradient from deep coral-pink and magenta at the horizon blending through soft rose and lilac to pale blue-lavender overhead. No visible sun disc. Soft diffused pink-magenta light with a gentle warm glow on all architectural surfaces. Cloud streaks in shades of deep pink, salmon, and violet. Dreamy, soft atmospheric quality.

sunset_purple.label: Закат фиолетовый
sunset_purple.desc: dramatic purple-violet sunset sky — rich gradient from deep violet and magenta at the horizon transitioning through purple and indigo to a deep blue-navy overhead. No visible sun disc. Cool purple-toned ambient light with soft warm magenta accents on cloud edges. Streaks of deep crimson, violet, and cool lavender in the upper sky. Moody and spectacular atmospheric palette.

bluehour.label: Синий час
bluehour.desc: blue hour dusk sky — deep rich saturated blue gradient from deep indigo and violet overhead transitioning to soft purple-blue, then a thin band of pale rose-orange at the very horizon. No visible sun disc. Cool blue-violet ambient light on all surfaces. Calm, serene twilight atmosphere with subtle pink undertones near the horizon.

overcast.label: Пасмурно
overcast.desc: bright overcast day — soft uniform light grey-white sky. Completely even diffused lighting with no directional shadows, neutral cool-to-neutral ambient light, gentle soft-edged shadows, clean bright appearance.

dramatic.label: Драматичные тучи
dramatic.desc: dramatic moody storm sky — dark heavy towering storm clouds in deep charcoal and slate grey, swirling formations with silver-edged cloud breaks. No visible sun disc. Brooding atmospheric tension with cool dramatic ambient light on all ground surfaces. Possible distant violet-grey rain curtains in the background.

night.label: Ночь/Сумерки
night.desc: night twilight sky — very dark deep blue-black overhead transitioning to deep indigo, then a faint residual violet-pink twilight glow at the horizon. Stars beginning to appear. No visible sun disc. Soft warm artificial lighting naturally enhancing architecture. Photorealistic evening atmosphere.

sunrise.label: Рассвет
sunrise.desc: soft sunrise morning sky — gentle gradient from pale gold and warm peach at the horizon blending through soft coral-pink and lavender to pale blue overhead. No visible sun disc. Low-angle directional morning light from off-frame casting long shadows opposite the light source. Delicate pink-peach tones on cloud undersides. Fresh clean morning quality with subtle warm glow on all surfaces.

clouds.few: with a few scattered fluffy white cumulus clouds with soft pink-tinted undersides
clouds.clear: with a completely clear sky and no clouds visible
clouds.cirrus: with thin wispy high-altitude cirrus clouds adding delicate texture
clouds.partial: with light scattered mid-altitude clouds in soft tones creating varied dappled light

scenes.outdoor: TASK: Replace only the sky in this outdoor real estate photo with a new sky as described below. Keep every single ground-level and architectural element — building facade, walls, roof, trees, vehicles, pavement, fencing, garden — completely unchanged in position, texture, color, and condition. Blend the new sky seamlessly at every roofline, treetop, and horizon edge. Adjust ground-level lighting and shadow direction to naturally match the new sky's light source position.
scenes.drone: TASK: Replace only the sky in this aerial drone real estate photograph with a new sky as described below. Keep all visible ground features — rooftops, roads, trees, cars, landscape, fields — completely unchanged. Blend the new sky seamlessly from the aerial overhead perspective. Adjust reflected light on rooftops and ground surfaces to match the new sky's lighting direction.
scenes.indoor: TASK: This is an interior photo. FIRST — check if windows, glass doors, or skylights with a visible outdoor sky or exterior view are present in this photo. IF NO outdoor view is visible at all: make ZERO changes to this image — leave it completely untouched and output it as-is. Only proceed if outdoor sky or light is actually visible in the image. IF outdoor light IS visible: subtly adjust the color and mood of any sky or outdoor light visible through windows and glass doors to reflect the new time of day described below. Softly adjust the ambient fill light inside the room to match the new outdoor light color temperature and direction — warm for golden hour, cool for blue hour, bright for midday. Do NOT add windows or openings where none exist in the original. Do NOT add clouds, sky, or outdoor elements to any wall, ceiling, or solid surface. Do NOT globally recolor or repaint the interior. Preserve all furniture, walls, floors, ceiling, and fixtures exactly as they are.
